steps.name: Cancel non-guaranteed bookings
steps.hint: Filter reservations with no guarantee method and cancel per policy.

steps.name: CC recancellations
steps.hint: Run credit card recancellations for failed or declined cards in Opera.

steps.name: Cancel OTA rooms + mark card invalid
steps.hint: Cancel Booking.com/OTA rooms with invalid Virtual Credit Cards.

steps.name: Check immigration / nationality report
steps.hint: Verify all in-house guests have nationality assigned. Fix missing entries.

steps.name: Charge VCCs for tomorrow arrivals
steps.hint: Charge any Virtual Credit Cards due tonight for tomorrow arrivals.

steps.name: Update no-show sheet (pre-run)
steps.hint: Flag expected no-shows before running the night audit.

steps.name: Save Inhouse Guest Complimentary report
steps.hint: Export and save complimentary in-house guest report before night run.

steps.name: Zero rate room report — remove pseudo rooms
steps.hint: Run zero-rate report. Pseudo/dummy rooms must be empty before night run.

steps.name: Paidout report + attach commission & FD docs
steps.hint: Save paidout report and scan/attach commission and FD paidout receipts.

steps.name: Refund report + attach documents
steps.hint: Save refund report and scan/attach any refund slips from today.

steps.name: Rate check — select check-in & search
steps.hint: Perform rate check using today check-in date filter before running the night.

steps.name: Run the night audit
steps.hint: Execute the night audit in Opera. Do not interrupt once started.

steps.name: Manager report
steps.hint: Generate and save the manager report after night audit completed.

steps.name: No-show report + post charges
steps.hint: Finalise no-show list post-night and post charges where required.

steps.name: Negative posting report
steps.hint: Review all negative postings and resolve or escalate discrepancies.

steps.name: Room recancellations (post-night)
steps.hint: Process any room recancellations held until after the night audit.

steps.name: Flash report
steps.hint: Prepare and distribute the flash report with tonight key figures.

tasks.name: Check overnight log from night shift
Check VIP arrivals and prepare welcome
Cover lunch breaks for morning shift
Coordinate with housekeeping on room status
